title: Blackmoor 65559 80pcs Paper Air Fryer Liners/Non-Stick Parchment Paper/Multipurpose for Other Cooker Types Inc. Steamers, Microwaves and Ovens / 22 x 14 cm
features: AIR FRYER LINERS – This pack of 80 flat paper liners are made from parchment paper and are sized at 22 x 14 cm. They effectively keep food residue away from your air fryer to keep it clean between uses and their porous nature allows for air circulation, helping to achieve crisp and evenly cooked food.

NON-STICK AND VERSATILE – The liners are non-stick and eliminate the need for cooking oil or sprays, promoting healthier cooking options. They can be used for a wide range of foods, including meats, vegetables, and baked goods, and can withstand a maximum temperature of 220°C.

EASY TO USE – The non-stick liners come in pre-cut sizes that can be easily trimmed to fit different air fryers, providing a perfect fit for your specific appliance. Compared with silicone air fryer liners, air fryer paper liners are more convenient and reduce cleanup time.

WIDE APPLICATION – The liners are suitable to use in air fryers, steamers, microwaves, and ovens. The liners can extend the lifespan of your air fryer as they prevent spills and splatters sticking to the bottom of the basket.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: These air fryer liners, made from durable parchment paper and sized at 22 x 14 cm, are a convenient solution for keeping your air fryer clean and ensuring even, crispy cooking results. Designed to prevent food residue from sticking to the basket, the liners promote healthier cooking by eliminating the need for oils or sprays. Their porous design allows for efficient air circulation, while the non-stick surface makes them perfect for a variety of foods, from meats and vegetables to baked goods. Heat-resistant up to 220°C, these liners are pre-cut for ease of use and can be trimmed to fit different air fryers, making them a versatile choice. Suitable for air fryers, steamers, microwaves, and ovens, they not only simplify cleanup but also help extend the lifespan of your appliance by preventing spills and splatters.
